hypotheses.claim: Frontier checkpoints are durable, hash-verified, and resolvable from a fresh clone.
hypotheses.falsifier: Checkpoints are missing, hashes do not match, or remote references are unresolvable.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A canonical decoder/path exists and produces invariant semantic outcomes across decoder variations.
hypotheses.falsifier: Decoder path changes still change the primary semantic metric or no canonical path can be selected.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Binding-aware meaningful v2 separates valid-but-empty/useless programs from genuinely useful outputs.
hypotheses.falsifier: The metric can be gamed by minimal-valid, rare-omission, or inventory-free outputs.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Judge/human agreement and cross-family scoring show the semantic judge is independent and stable.
hypotheses.falsifier: Judge conflicts or family-specific inflation exceed a tolerable rate.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Prior rejected levers remain negative under five seeds, paired tests, corrected decoder, and independent labels.
hypotheses.falsifier: At least one prior rejection changes classification when confounds are removed.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A 1–7B external model constrained by the same compiler achieves a nontrivial semantic ceiling above the tiny SLM.
hypotheses.falsifier: The external constrained model is near zero, indicating a specification/representation/evaluator limit.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: The frozen E228 recipe shows a clear exposure threshold at ≥100× cumulative token exposure.
hypotheses.falsifier: Semantic metrics remain flat through ≥100× exposure while loss improves or saturates.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Valid-but-empty/minimal-shell outputs win because of length or mask-mass bias, and a principled correction helps.
hypotheses.falsifier: Empty outputs are preferred by the model score, not the decoder, or corrections do not improve semantics.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: X22 valid-state tree-edit quality scales predictably with beam width and/or edit depth before saturating.
hypotheses.falsifier: Quality is flat across beam width and depth while search coverage rises.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Observe-only trigger predicates fire predictively before recoverable semantic failures under a non-greedy regime.
hypotheses.falsifier: Triggers never fire or fire without predicting failure/recovery benefit.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Conflict-localized remasking repairs more failures with fewer edits than full remask or suffix rollback.
hypotheses.falsifier: Slices are too imprecise, miss dependencies, or provide no cost/quality benefit at equal budgets.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A cached cheap-to-expensive verifier cascade preserves ≥95% of flat-stack pruning at ≤30% verifier cost.
hypotheses.falsifier: The cascade loses >5% sound pruning, changes outcomes, or cannot reduce cost below 30–50%.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A 50/50 gold/on-policy DAgger-style state mixture outperforms pure sources on held-out self-failure recovery.
hypotheses.falsifier: The mixture provides no recovery gain, or rollout labels are too sparse/noisy to beat pure gold.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Including 5–15% near-solved semantic corruptions improves local recovery and fixed-point stability without harming generation.
hypotheses.falsifier: Near-solved mass produces no recovery gain, causes copying, or degrades full-generation quality.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: The choice representation reaches a preregistered semantic target at smaller capacity/bytes than the surface representation.
hypotheses.falsifier: After correcting the decoder, surface and choice capacity curves are equivalent or surface is better.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A contract-grounded selector with calibrated abstention closes the pass@K-to-selected-pass@K gap.
hypotheses.falsifier: Candidate pools contain useful programs but no selector beats simple baselines at the target risk.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: Canonical AST deduplication increases within-prompt unique hard-valid modes and semantic pass@K at fixed cost.
hypotheses.falsifier: Deduplication changes only bookkeeping, does not increase unique valid modes, or removes semantically distinct candidates.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: AST-sketch data balancing and/or choice-native retrieval improve semantic quality at fixed budget without leakage.
hypotheses.falsifier: Sketch balancing or choice retrieval is equivalent to controls or harms OOD semantics/copying.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A trailed, dependency-aware solver avoids false prunes that a monotone proposal-contingent state cannot recover from.
hypotheses.falsifier: Production architecture never places proposal facts in irreversible state, or both policies recover identically.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A weight-shared recursive denoiser with deep supervision improves semantic/recovery metrics at matched block evaluations.
hypotheses.falsifier: Recursive arms are equivalent or worse under matched cost and exposure.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

hypotheses.claim: A learned high-level stochastic recursive state increases valid semantic mode coverage and selected quality at matched cost.
hypotheses.falsifier: Samples collapse to one mode, low-level noise matches/exceeds high-level width, or selector cannot convert width safely.
hypotheses.state_reason: No committed result manifest matched the expected refs.

payload.claim: Frontier checkpoints are durable, hash-verified, and resolvable from a fresh clone.
A canonical decoder/path exists and produces invariant semantic outcomes across decoder variations.
Binding-aware meaningful v2 separates valid-but-empty/useless programs from genuinely useful outputs.
Judge/human agreement and cross-family scoring show the semantic judge is independent and stable.
Prior rejected levers remain negative under five seeds, paired tests, corrected decoder, and independent labels.
A 1–7B external model constrained by the same compiler achieves a nontrivial semantic ceiling above the tiny SLM.
The frozen E228 recipe shows a clear exposure threshold at ≥100× cumulative token exposure.
Valid-but-empty/minimal-shell outputs win because of length or mask-mass bias, and a principled correction helps.
X22 valid-state tree-edit quality scales predictably with beam width and/or edit depth before saturating.
Observe-only trigger predicates fire predictively before recoverable semantic failures under a non-greedy regime.
Conflict-localized remasking repairs more failures with fewer edits than full remask or suffix rollback.
A cached cheap-to-expensive verifier cascade preserves ≥95% of flat-stack pruning at ≤30% verifier cost.
A 50/50 gold/on-policy DAgger-style state mixture outperforms pure sources on held-out self-failure recovery.
Including 5–15% near-solved semantic corruptions improves local recovery and fixed-point stability without harming generation.
The choice representation reaches a preregistered semantic target at smaller capacity/bytes than the surface representation.
A contract-grounded selector with calibrated abstention closes the pass@K-to-selected-pass@K gap.
Canonical AST deduplication increases within-prompt unique hard-valid modes and semantic pass@K at fixed cost.
AST-sketch data balancing and/or choice-native retrieval improve semantic quality at fixed budget without leakage.
A trailed, dependency-aware solver avoids false prunes that a monotone proposal-contingent state cannot recover from.
A weight-shared recursive denoiser with deep supervision improves semantic/recovery metrics at matched block evaluations.
A learned high-level stochastic recursive state increases valid semantic mode coverage and selected quality at matched cost.

payload.primary_reason: Core measurement issues (checkpoint provenance, decoder invariance, semantic metric, judge independence, re-adjudication) are not all POSITIVE. Without durable, invariant, independently measured evidence, no causal diagnosis of training, data, search, or architecture can be asserted.
payload.counterfactual_evidence: Counterfactual: if SLM-103/104/105/106/107 were all POSITIVE, the remaining NOT_RUN_BY_GATE states could be attributed to training-exposure or architecture limits rather than to measurement uncertainty.

next_programs.objective: Make frontier checkpoint provenance and persistence fail-closed.
next_programs.non_duplicate_rationale: EFS0-01 is the root dependency of every causal claim; no later branch is interpretable without it.
next_programs.expected_information_gain: Distinguishes measurement-limited from genuinely architecture-limited conclusions.
next_programs.smallest_experiment: Sync one E228-class checkpoint to hf://buckets/TKendrick/OpenUI and verify hash from a fresh clone.
next_programs.kill_criterion: Hash mismatch or unresolvable checkpoint blocks all dependent syntheses.

next_programs.objective: Run the ≥100× E228 exposure ladder to falsify 'just train longer'.
next_programs.non_duplicate_rationale: EFS1-02 is the only branch designed to separate exposure from representation/objective limits.
next_programs.expected_information_gain: Either reveals an exposure threshold or falsifies the current recipe.
next_programs.smallest_experiment: Continue seed-0 run to 128× T0 and confirm 1×/threshold/128× on seeds 1–2.
next_programs.kill_criterion: Semantic metrics flat with tight CI excluding minimum useful delta.

next_programs.objective: Re-run the B3 surface-vs-choice capacity ladder with the corrected choice-native decoder.
next_programs.non_duplicate_rationale: EFS3-03 isolates representation capacity from the prior decoder confound.
next_programs.expected_information_gain: Determines whether externalized syntax shifts the quality-capacity curve.
next_programs.smallest_experiment: 18-row grid (2 representations × 3 widths × 3 seeds) on frozen recipe.
next_programs.kill_criterion: Capacity curves overlap within equivalence margin.
